title: Written In An Ovid
content:
Ovid is the surest guide
You can name to show the way
To any woman, maid, or bride,
Who resolves to go astray.
meaning:
"Written In An Ovid" is a quintessential example of Matthew Prior's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
